message:
fix(pal): decode all octal escape sequences in mount paths (M9)

unescape_mount_field previously only handled \040 (space). The Linux
kernel uses generic \NNN octal escapes in /proc/mounts for special
characters like tab (\011), newline (\012), and backslash (\134).
Replaced single-case replace() with a full octal decoder loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
